db/missing-fk-index._calibrationNote: v5 SQL pilot (2026-06-26): fires on 78.5% of production human schemas. Heuristic likely too broad (catches Drizzle/Prisma auto-naming). Audit before re-calibration.

db/missing-not-null._calibrationNote: v5 SQL pilot (2026-06-26): AI-generated schemas are MORE careful with NOT NULL than production. Consider inverting purpose — turn into a 'production schema hygiene' rule rather than an AI signal.

db/naming-inconsistency._calibrationNote: v5 SQL pilot (2026-06-26): equal fire rate on both sides. AI tools are consistent in naming; heuristic likely too broad (catches legitimate cross-language snake/camel mixing).

logic/bayesian-conditional._calibrationNote: v0.12.0 ship — new Bayesian LR-combiner rule (Bento et al. 2024 *Neurocomputing*). Default-off until v0.12 corpus re-calibration lands. Threshold P(AI|fires) ≥ 0.7; posterior computed from per-rule likelihood ratios.

logic/heaps-deviation._calibrationNote: v0.12.0 ship — new Zipf/Heaps rule (Christ et al. EMNLP Findings 2025). Default-off until v0.12 corpus re-calibration lands. Threshold |λ - 0.5| / 0.15 ≥ 2σ.

logic/ks-distribution-shift._calibrationNote: v0.12.0 ship — new Kolmogorov–Smirnov multi-feature shift detector (arXiv:2510.15996 Oct 2025). Default-off until v0.12 corpus re-calibration lands. Bonferroni-corrected α=0.05/K over 3 features (line lengths, identifier lengths, comment density).

logic/zipf-slope-anomaly._calibrationNote: v0.12.0 ship — new Zipf slope anomaly rule (Christ et al. EMNLP Findings 2025). Default-off until v0.12 corpus re-calibration lands. Threshold |s - 1.0| / 0.25 ≥ 2σ, R² ≥ 0.7.
